channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.ign.com

item.title: Magic's TMNT Draft Night Box Is Discounted For Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.content:encoded:
Magic: The Gathering's latest set, featuring the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles, is out in the wild and ready to rip. Amazon has plenty of Magic: The Gathering deals right now as part of its Big Spring Sale, including the TMNT Draft Night box for about $40 off the regular price.

This self-contained kit is designed for four players to set up their own head-to-head Magic draft from the included booster packs and is a great way to learn to play with your friends in a low-stakes environment.

Save 31% on Magic: The Gathering's TMNT Draft Night Box at Amazon

Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles - Draft Night Box

The TMNT Draft Night Box is currently available for just over $80, nearly $40 off its regular price. This self-contained kit is perfect for a four-player draft. Each box contains 12 Booster Packs, 90 Lands cards, and one Collector Booster, which you can either rip yourself or give to the winner.

The Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles aren't the only crossover set to come to Magic: The Gathering recently, with massive properties like Final Fantasy, Spider-Man, Avatar: The Last Airbender, and many more, all getting unique sets over the past couple of years.

2026 is shaping up to be another busy year for Magic: The Gathering, with Marvel Super Heroes, The Hobbit, and Star Trek all scheduled to release before the year wraps up. Check out the full schedule for upcoming release dates and where you can preorder each set.

Matthew Adler has written for IGN since 2019 covering all things gaming, tech, tabletop games, and more. You can follow him on the site formerly known as Twitter @MatthewAdler and watch him stream on Twitch.



https://www.ign.com/articles/magics-tmnt-draft-night-box-is-discounted-for-amazons-big-spring-sale
